# Autogenerated resource verifier 0.1.3, released 2026-06-24

Code name: Update dependencies on top of 0.1.2

## Summary

This release updates dependencies and the release process.

## Dependency Updates

* Updated `com.exasol:error-reporting-java:0.4.1` to `1.0.2`
